headline: On May 27, Subsidiary Of Boston Properties LP Entered Into Agreement To Sell Certain Property For Gross Purchase Price Of $63M; Buyer Paid Non-refundable Cash Deposit Of About $6M That Will Be Credited Against Purchase Price At Closing; Co And BPLP Will Recognize Non-Cash Impairment Loss Of About $18M And $17M , Respectively, In Q2 2026 In Accordance With GAAP
summary: Consistent with the strategic asset sales plan outlined at BXP, Inc.'s September 2025 Investor Day, on May 27, 2026, a subsidiary of Boston Properties Limited Partnership ("BPLP") entered into an agreement to sell
